features: PURE AND GENTLE FOR BABY’S DELICATE SKIN: We know your top priority is keeping your little one healthy and happy, Huggies Pure baby wipes are soft and gentle, made from 100% naturally derived fibres and are designed to provide better cleaning to care for sensitive skin.
REBALANCE SKIN pH: Huggies wipes help protect against causes of skin irritation and help rebalance skin pH to support the natural skin barrier during nappy changes

12 PACKS, 576 TOTAL WIPES - READY FOR EVERYDAY FAMILY LIFE: Twelve convenient packs of 48 wipes giving you a total of 576 wet wipes, each pack easily fits inside nappy bags and travel kits, easy to reseal to help lock in moisture for fresh wipes each time
SUITABLE FOR NEWBORNS, TODDLERS AND EVERYDAY USE: Whether it’s mealtime, playtime or nappy changes, these baby wipes are perfect for hands, faces and bottoms from day one
PLASTIC FREE WIPES: Made with 100% naturally derived fibres and 0% plastic for a caring clean you can feel good about, dispose of in household waste and do not flush
description: Product Description At Huggies® we know your top priority is keeping your little one healthy and happy. These Huggies Pure plastic free baby wipes are made from 100% naturally derived fibres and infused with 99% water for gentle, effective cleansing. Ideal for newborn sensitive skin, they are fragrance free and hypoallergenic, clinically and dermatologically tested, and approved by the British Skin Foundation. The soft, quilted texture provides thorough yet caring clean-ups for nappy changes, mealtimes and on-the-go messes without leaving residue. This multipack includes twelve compact, resealable packs of 48 wipes (576 total). Minimal ingredients support skin comfort with a pH-balanced formulation. Suitable for hands, faces and bottoms from day one. Dispose of in household waste—do not flush. Huggies brings trusted baby-skin expertise parents rely on. Safety Warning, for external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources.
